title: viola tricolor subsp. bellioides
intro: Viola tricolor subsp. bellioides, also known as Pansy or Heartsease, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the violet family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Viola tricolor subsp. bellioides include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
